content: I began my **Master**'s degree studies at **Wuhan University**.

Our work "**_Multiscale Restoration of Missing Data in Optical Time-series Images with Masked Spatial-Temporal Attention Network_**" was accepted by **IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing (TGRS)**.

Our work "**_Image-text mutual retrieval method based on large-scale pre-training CLIP model fine-tuning_**" won the **Grand Prize (Top 0.1%)** and **20,000 RMB** cash in the **12th "Teddy Cup" Data Mining Challenge** [[link]](https://www.tipdm.org/dsej12/2429.jhtml).
